channel.title: GAEMI POS Updates
channel.item:
Version 1.0.7
● 최초 릴리스 ● WPF + WebView2 하이브리드 POS 앱 ● 자동 업데이트 채널 연결
Tue, 14 Apr 2026 12:00:00 +0900 <enclosure url="https://github.com/yongdo-kim/test-pos/releases/download/v1.0.7-c/GAEMI-Setup-1.0.7.exe sparkle:version="1.0.7" sparkle:os="windows" length="296959541" type="application/vnd.microsoft.portable-executable" />
